## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behaviour.
- [ ] I updated user-facing documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` where relevant.
- [ ] I regenerated committed schemas if protocol models changed.
- [ ] I considered compatibility, security, privacy and dependency licensing.
- [ ] I ran the repository quality gate after my final edit.
- [ ] My commits include a DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`).
